---
title: "From cosmx to spatialexperiment"
namespace: "Convert"
description: "Creates a SpatialExperiment object from the downloaded unzipped CosMx directory for Nanostring CosMx spatial gene expression data, and saves it as a SpatialExperiment object."
type: "module"
toc: false
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `from_cosmx_to_spatialexperiment`  
Namespace: `convert`

### Links
[Source](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial/blob/v0.5.0/src/convert/from_cosmx_to_spatialexperiment/config.vsh.yaml){.btn-action .btn-sm .btn-info .btn role="button"}

:::

The constructor assumes the downloaded unzipped CosMx Folder has the following structure:

Mandatory files
· | — *_exprMat_file.csv
· | — *_metadata_file.csv
Optional files, by default added to the metadata() as a list of paths (will be converted to parquet):
· | —*_fov_positions_file.csv
· | — *_tx_file.csv
· | — *_polygons.csv


## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial \
  -r v0.5.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_cosmx_to_spatialexperiment/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>
```yaml

```
</details>

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial \
  -r v0.5.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_cosmx_to_spatialexperiment/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

## Argument group

### Arguments

|Name                                |Description                                                                                                                             |Attributes                                                                                           |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input`                           |Input CosMx directory                                                                                                                   |`file`, required, example: `"path/to/cosmx_bundle"`                                                  |
|`--add_tx_path`                     |Whether to add parquet paths to the metadata.  If True, `*_tx_file.csv` file will be converted to .parquet and added to the metadata.   |`boolean`, default: `TRUE`                                                                           |
|`--add_polygon_path`                |Whether to add polygon path to the metadata. If True, `*_polygons.csv` file will be converted to .parquet and be added to the metadata. |`boolean`, default: `TRUE`                                                                           |
|`--add_fov_positions`               |Whether to add fov positions to the metadata. If True, `fov_positions_file.csv` will be added to the metadata.                          |`boolean`, default: `TRUE`                                                                           |
|`--alternative_experiment_features` |Feature names containing these strings will be moved to altExps(sxe) slots as separate SpatialExperiment objects.                       |List of `string`, default: `"NegPrb", "Negative", "SystemControl", "FalseCode"`, multiple_sep: `";"` |
|`--output`                          |Output SpatialExperiment file                                                                                                           |`file`, required, example: `"output.rds"`                                                            |

## Authors


  * Dorien Roosen [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/dorien-er) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dorien-roosen) (author, maintainer)
